messages: social repair 很急但 boundary guard 更强的时候，先把 repair 留在 bounded arbitration。
不要把关系修复压力直接升级成外发动作。

environment_context.outcome_summary: social repair demand collided with high boundary pressure

owner_bootstrap.rationale_summary: social repair pressure remains bounded when boundary guard is high
owner_bootstrap.priority_reason: guard before repair when social repair and boundary conflict intensify

observation_refs.text_preview: 这个设计挺聪明的——让紧急的 repair 不直接硬冲 boundary，而是先在仲裁层"排队候着"，既尊重了边界，也没丢掉修复意图。
对，repair 再急也得先过一道闸——不能因为"想要修复"就让压力本身变成行动理由。

boundary: This report proves a controlled runtime-mainline selfhood integration proposal-only writeback path. It does not prove live autonomy, direct reply authority, or broader transport maturity.
external_risk_note: Provider 429/401 remains an external budget-layer risk; it is not counted as a WP14 blocker unless it regresses formal owner selfhood integration writeback.
